content.problemStatement:
You are given a string SSS of length NNN, containing lowercase Latin letters. You are also given an integer KKK.

You would like to create a new string S‚Ä≤S'S‚Ä≤ by following the following process:


First, partition SSS into exactly KKK non-empty subsequences S1,S2,‚Ä¶,SKS_1, S_2, \ldots, S_KS1‚Äã,S2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,SK‚Äã. Note that every character of SSS must be present in exactly one of the SiS_iSi‚Äã.
Then, create S‚Ä≤S'S‚Ä≤ as the concatenation of these subsequences, i.e, S‚Ä≤=S1+S2+‚Ä¶+SKS' = S_1 + S_2 + \ldots + S_KS‚Ä≤=S1‚Äã+S2‚Äã+‚Ä¶+SK‚Äã, where +++ denotes string concatenation.
Determine the **lexicographically** smallest S‚Ä≤S'S‚Ä≤ that can be created.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers, NNN and KKK.
The second line of each test case contains the string SSS.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the lexicographically smallest string S‚Ä≤S'S‚Ä≤ that can be created.
constraints: SSS contains only lowercase Latin letters.
Sum of NNN over all cases won't exceed 2‚ãÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚ãÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: K=1K = 1K=1, so our only option is to set S‚Ä≤=S1=whizzyS' = S_1 = whizzyS‚Ä≤=S1‚Äã=whizzy.
Test Case 222: Partition S=aaacdecdebacdeS = \textcolor{red}{aaa}\textcolor{blue}{cdecdeb}\textcolor{red}{ac}\textcolor{blue}{de}S=aaacdecdebacde into S1=aaaacS_1 = \textcolor{red}{aaaac}S1‚Äã=aaaac and S2=cdecdebdeS_2 = \textcolor{blue}{cdecdebde}S2‚Äã=cdecdebde, to form S‚Ä≤=aaaaccdecdebdeS' = aaaaccdecdebdeS‚Ä≤=aaaaccdecdebde.
Test Case 333: Partition S=dbcaS = d\textcolor{blue}{bc}\textcolor{red}{a}S=dbca into S1=aS_1 = \textcolor{red}{a}S1‚Äã=a, S2=bcS_2 = \textcolor{blue}{bc}S2‚Äã=bc, and S3=dS_3 = dS3‚Äã=d to form S‚Ä≤=abcdS' = abcdS‚Ä≤=abcd.
In both test cases 222 and 333, it can be shown that no other partition gives a lexicographically smaller S‚Ä≤S'S‚Ä≤.
